reviews.review_description: This Lab was so engaging and instructive. Each step is clearly indicated and easy to follow. The overview section is very helpful in giving an overall view of the animal and its systems before going into the actual dissection. Very exciting to see this level of detail in a VR application for educational purposes.

This was clearly made by a biology teacher.  Completely gives my kids a jump start, and they find it fun as well.  Easy to use, cool opening gallery.  Great notes and process.  We use it on the Quest 3.
